shipping.summary: Shipping Made Simple Worldwide delivery with DHL Standard and express options available Tracked delivery for peace of mind Duties & Taxes International orders may be subject to customs duties or import taxes depending on your country.

tax.summary: Shipping Made Simple Worldwide delivery with DHL Standard and express options available Tracked delivery for peace of mind Duties & Taxes International orders may be subject to customs duties or import taxes depending on your country.

fee.summary: Important Information A £5 return fee will be deducted from your refund once a return is created This fee applies once a label is generated, even if not used All returns are fully tracked Returning Without the Portal You can return your item using your own courier.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
